description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named tests that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use a matrix strategy to test with multiple Python versions (3.8, 3.9, 3.10, 3.11) and PyTorch versions (2.0.1+cpu, 2.1.2+cpu, 2.2.2+cpu, 2.3.0+cpu) on ubuntu-latest. For each job, check out the code, set up Python, install dependencies from requirements-dev.txt and requirements.txt, install torch and other dependencies, install skorch, and run tests with pytest.
